productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Brown Casual Shoes
description: These numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, bold stitch detailing and aggressive design highlights is a must buy. Rough up your ensemble with this cowboy referenced sneaker. Wear them with fitted denims and a tee. Throw on a tonal jacket for added style.UpperTextured synthetic leather upper for durability, comfort and styleStitched synthetic overlays for midfoot supportLace-up system for snug, customised FitSynthetic leather tongue for midfoot comfortPrinted branding on tongue and embroidered branding on the side for styleTextured overlay on the heel cup for enhanced durabilityMidsolePU midsole for lightweight, cushioned comfortPadded foot-bed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable TPU outsole in herringbone pattern for maximum traction and gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
